items.sentence: A cluster of grapes disappeared quickly when Ashwin found them in the fridge.
The commander gave orders to the team during the mission.
Ashwin dreams about his future as a famous inventor or maybe a professional gamer.
Ashwin wore his goggles so he could see clearly underwater in the pool.
The balloon floated up because it was filled with helium.
Always wear a helmet when riding your bike to protect your head.
The astronauts studied the lunar surface of the moon.
Ashwin built a massive tower of blocks that almost touched the ceiling.
The pilot carefully landed the airplane during the storm.
The train arrived at the platform just as we got there.
The park is open to the public every day.
Ashwin seldom wakes up early on weekends.
The referee used a whistle as a signal to start the game.
Ashwin used his tablet to play games and do homework.
Water turned into vapor as it boiled on the stove.
Ashwin missed the bus because he was still tying his shoes.
A light mist covered the field early in the morning.
They used the wind to sail across the lake.
Ashwin was excited because his favorite game was on sale.
